title: Base64 Basics
description:
Base64 is a common encoding scheme used to represent binary data in ASCII text.

Your task: Decode the following string:

YmFzZTY0X2RlY29kZWQ=
hints: Look carefully at the characters used in the string
The character at the very end of the string is a common giveaway for this encoding
Search for 'From Base64' in CyberChef and paste the string in
